offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent customer payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide credit risk monitoring instead of manual credit assessments and ad-hoc payment reminders.
problem: Inconsistent customer payments leading to cash flow issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about payment issues
DM 20-50 Etsy sellers with demo video
Share insights in Etsy seller forums/groups
try_it: Let users try our credit risk monitoring tool for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing invoices
